security_considerations: Core-only baseline; badge eligibility remains subject to non-degraded conformance execution.
description: Core-only baseline profile aligned with PF_AICP_BASE_0.1 and Core suite evidence.
compatibility_notes: Stable baseline profile; maintain backward compatibility for core-only profile semantics.

security_considerations: Delegated identity claims must be issuer-signed, expiry-bounded, and revocation-enforced for acting-on-behalf-of use.
description: Delegated identity profile aligned with PF_AICP_DELEGATED_IDENTITY_0.1 required suites.

security_considerations: Ops-hardened mediated blocking requires deterministic alerts/recovery semantics and resume continuity checks in addition to downgrade-resistant CAPNEG and enforcement gates.
description: Operations-hardened mediated blocking profile aligned with PF_AICP_MEDIATED_BLOCKING_OPS_0.1 required suites.

security_considerations: Mediated blocking requires deterministic CAPNEG, policy-eval, and enforcement gate checks with downgrade resistance.
description: Mediated blocking profile aligned with PF_AICP_MEDIATED_BLOCKING_0.1 required suites.

security_considerations: Reception mediation needs authenticated participant roles, deterministic policy/enforcement checks, and auditable security-alert/dispute handling.
description: Reception chat profile aligned with PF_AICP_RECEPTION_CHAT_0.1 required suites.

security_considerations: Resume and object resync flows must prevent replay, cross-session confusion, and unbounded recovery amplification.
description: Resumable sessions profile aligned with PF_AICP_RESUMABLE_SESSIONS_0.1 required suites.

security_considerations: Workflow/delegation chaining requires strict tool-gating, delegation scope/expiry checks, tamper-evident workflow state transitions, and non-degraded evidence for badge claims.
description: Workflow orchestration and delegation profile aligned with PF_AICP_WORKFLOW_ORCHESTRATION_DELEGATION_0.1 required suites; platform may enforce deployment-specific controls.
